overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking along the sunny Del Perro beachfront promenade. The character passes the distinctive Freakshow building with its white pergola structure and continues along the boardwalk lined with palm trees, souvenir shops, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with benches and historic building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the boardwalk toward the large building with the distinctive pergola roof

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and shorts walking away from the camera
man in tank top and dark shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large three-story building with white pergola roof structure and arched windows
concrete and metal benches lining the boardwalk
tall palm trees lining the beach side of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sunny beachfront promenade with the large pergola building on the left and benches on the right. Pedestrians move in both directions along the wide paved walkway, with palm trees visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic building facade with freakshow entrance and red windows

events.description: turns left to follow the building facade, revealing the freakshow entrance with red circular windows

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade, passing the freakshow entrance and red decorative windows

notable_agents.action: woman in pink shorts and red cap walking along the building
man in orange shirt and sunglasses walking toward the camera

entered.detail: building entrance with gold 'Freakshow' signage above arched doorway
large red circular windows with eye designs on the building facade
red brick staircase leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow the building's facade, revealing the ornate Freakshow entrance with its distinctive red circular windows. The character walks past brick staircases and other pedestrians exploring the building front, while the pergola structure remains prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with souvenir shops and palm tree lining

events.description: passes the corner of the freakshow building and enters the shop-lined boardwalk area

agents.ego_description: walking past souvenir shops and merchandise displays along the busy boardwalk

notable_agents.action: woman in bikini top and shorts walking along the palm tree line
vendor standing near colorful merchandise display rack

entered.detail: row of commercial storefronts with colorful awnings and merchandise displays
outdoor display racks with postcards and souvenirs
dense line of tall palm trees separating the boardwalk from the beach

segments.scene_description: Leaving the Freakshow building behind, the character enters a commercial stretch of the boardwalk lined with souvenir shops and merchandise displays on the left. Palm trees line the right side, and various pedestrians browse the stalls or walk along the open concrete promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching street intersection with downtown view

events.description: approaches an open plaza area with a street intersection and views of downtown skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the street intersection with scattered pedestrians nearby

notable_agents.action: two men walking together across the plaza toward the shops
woman in white shorts and hat walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: low commercial building with green roof and red awnings
tall glass skyscrapers visible in the distance against the horizon
paved street crossing with bollards and power lines overhead

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk opens into a wider plaza area approaching a street intersection. A white building with a green roof sits at the corner, while downtown skyscrapers become visible in the distance. The crowd thins out as the character walks toward the street crossing with power lines overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny beachfront promenade that transitions from a landmark architectural site into a commercial boardwalk and finally toward an urban intersection. It begins with the character walking past a large pergola building and benches on a wide paved walkway under a clear blue sky. As the camera turns left, the view shifts to follow the ornate facade of the Freakshow building, passing its red circular windows and brick staircases. The scene then opens into a commercial stretch where the architecture gives way to souvenir shops and merchandise displays lined with palm trees. Finally, the boardwalk expands into a wide plaza near a white building with a green roof, revealing distant downtown skyscrapers as the character approaches a street crossing.
